'''''Mist Laden''''' was [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Lu'daal-ud]]'s personal [[Starship/Legends|ship]], in use by his associates of the [[Granse Confederacy]]. Lu'daal-ud captured the original owner, an independent trader, in the [[Imberlin system/Legends|Imberlin system]].<ref name="AIR" />

''Mist Laden'' was used much more than another of the Confederacy's ships, the ''[[Waterspire]]'', which was stolen from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It is unknown if it was used more than the third ship of the Confederacy, ''[[Nightcast]]''.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
